testcase.name: test_meta_modules

failure.message: AssertionError: assert (False) + where False = isinstance({'modules': [{'key': 'dashboard', 'label': 'Dashboard', 'actions': ['read']}, {'key': 'user', 'label': 'User Management', 'actions': ['create', 'read', 'update', 'delete']}, {'key': 'role', 'label': 'Role Management', 'actions': ['create', 'read', 'update', 'delete']}, {'key': 'team', 'label': 'Team Management', 'actions': ['create', 'read', 'update', 'delete']}, {'key': 'project', 'label': 'Project Management', 'actions': ['create', 'read', 'update', 'delete']}, {'key': 'task', 'label': 'Task Management', 'actions': ['create', 'read', 'update', 'delete', 'assign']}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sems_phase2.py:238: in test_meta_modules assert isinstance(mods, list) and len(mods) >= 5 E AssertionError: assert (False) E + where False = isinstance({'modules': [{'key': 'dashboard', 'label': 'Dashboard', 'actions': ['read']}, {'key': 'user', 'label': 'User Management', 'actions': ['create', 'read', 'update', 'delete']}, {'key': 'role', 'label': 'Role Management', 'actions': ['create', 'read', 'update', 'delete']}, {'key': 'team', 'label': 'Team Management', 'actions': ['create', 'read', 'update', 'delete']}, {'key': 'project', 'label': 'Project Management', 'actions': ['create', 'read', 'update', 'delete']}, {'key': 'task', 'label': 'Task Management', 'actions': ['create', 'read', 'update', 'delete', 'assign']}, ...]}, list)
